services.official_name_en: Heat emission control

services.purpose_en: Regulate heat delivery to occupied spaces according to demand.

functionality_levels.official_description_en: No automatic control
Central automatic control

services.purpose_en: Control thermally activated building structures for heating.

functionality_levels.official_description_en: No automatic control
Outside temperature compensated control
Demand based control

services.purpose_en: Match distribution temperature to building load (weather compensation).
services.when_applicable_en: When hydronic or air heating distribution exists.

services.official_name_en: Control of distribution pumps in networks
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie pompami obiegowymi w instalacji grzewczej

functionality_levels.official_description_en: No automatic control
On off control
Multi-Stage control
Variable speed pump control (pump unit (internal) estimations)
Variable speed pump control (external demand signal)

services.purpose_en: Optimize pump energy via speed or on/off control aligned with demand.
services.when_applicable_en: When circulation pumps serve heating distribution.

services.official_name_en: Thermal Energy Storage (TES) for building heating (excluding TABS)
services.preconditions_en: Only applicable in case thermal energy storage is present.

functionality_levels.official_description_en: Continuous storage operation
Time-scheduled storage operation
Load prediction based storage operation
Heat storage capable of flexible control through grid signals (e.g. DSM)

services.purpose_en: Modulate heat production to match building demand.
services.when_applicable_en: When boilers, heat pumps or district heat substations are present.

services.official_name_en: Heat generator control (all except heat pumps)

functionality_levels.official_description_en: Constant temperature control
Variable temperature control depending on outdoor temperature

services.purpose_en: Advanced control of heat pump operation including bivalent and hybrid modes.
services.when_applicable_en: When heat pumps provide space heating.

services.official_name_en: Heat generator control (for heat pumps)
services.preconditions_en: Only applicable in case of heat pumps

functionality_levels.official_description_en: On/Off-control of heat generator

Variable control of heat generator capacity depending on the load or demand (e.g. hot gas bypass, inverter frequency control)
Variable control of heat generator capacity depending on the load AND external signals from grid

services.purpose_en: Charge/discharge thermal storage aligned with demand and tariffs.
services.when_applicable_en: When buffer tanks or seasonal storage (excluding TABS) exist.

services.official_name_en: Sequencing in case of different heat generators
services.preconditions_en: Only applicable in case of multiple heat generators, mostly restricted to large buildings

functionality_levels.official_description_en: Priorities only based on running time
Control according to fixed priority list: e.g. based on rated energy efficiency
Control according to dynamic priority list (based on current energy efficiency, carbon emissions and capacity of generators, e.g. solar, geothermal heat, cogeneration plant, fossil fuels)
Control according to dynamic priority list (based on current AND predicted load, energy efficiency, carbon emissions  and capacity of generators)
Control according to dynamic priority list (based on current AND predicted load, energy efficiency, carbon emissions, capacity of generators AND external signals from grid)

services.purpose_en: Optimally switch between multiple heat sources.
services.when_applicable_en: When more than one heat generator is installed (mutually exclusive operation).

services.official_name_en: Report information regarding heating system performance
services.service_group_en: Information to occupants and facility managers

Central or remote reporting of performance evaluation including forecasting and/or benchmarking; also including predictive management and fault detection

services.when_applicable_en: When heating can participate in demand response.

prevention of overheating

Modulate or bypass heat recovery based on multiple room temperature sensors or predictive control

functionality_levels.official_description_en: No automatic control

Constant setpoint: A control loop enables to control the supply air_x000D_
temperature, the setpoint is constant and can only be modified by a manual_x000D_
action
Variable set point with outdoor temperature compensation
Variable set point with load dependant compensation. A control loop enables to control the supply air temperature. The setpoint is defined as a function of the loads in the room

services.official_name_en: Free cooling with mechanical ventilation system
services.official_name_pl: Free cooling z wykorzystaniem mechanicznej wentylacji

functionality_levels.official_description_en: No automatic control
Night cooling

Free cooling: air flows modulated during all periods of time to minimize the amount of mechanical_x000D_
cooling

H,x- directed control: The amount of outside air and recirculation air are modulated during all periods of time to minimize the amount of mechanical cooling. Calculation is performed on the basis of temperatures and humidity
(enthalpy).

services.purpose_en: Use outdoor air for cooling when conditions allow.

services.preconditions_en: The inspectability of the nature of the control algorithm would need to be facilitated for level 2. Service 7.5 in EN15232-1-17. Average impacts derived from multiple simulations to produce BACS factors in EN15232.

Demand side management possible for (some) individual TBS, but not coordinated over various domains
Coordinated demand side management of multiple TBS

services.purpose_en: FDD and maintenance support across systems.
services.when_applicable_en: When monitoring data enables fault detection.

services.official_name_en: Reporting information regarding demand side management performance and operation
services.official_name_pl: Detekcja obecności powiązana z usługami budynku

functionality_levels.official_description_en: None
Reporting information on current DSM status, including managed energy flows
Reporting information on currenthistorical and predicted DSM status, including managed energy flows

services.purpose_en: Use occupancy to drive heating, lighting and ventilation.
services.when_applicable_en: When building-wide occupancy sensing exists.

services.official_name_en: Override of DSM control

functionality_levels.official_description_en: No DSM control
DSM control without the possibility to override this control by the building user (occupant or facility manager)
Manual override and reactivation of DSM control by the building user
Scheduled override of DSM control (and reactivation) by the building user
Scheduled override of DSM control and reactivation with optimised control

services.purpose_en: Report load shifting and DSM outcomes.
services.when_applicable_en: When DSM strategies are implemented.

services.official_name_en: Single platform that allows automated control & coordination between TBS + optimization of energy flow based on occupancy, weather and grid signals

services.service_group_en: Single platform that allows automated control & coordination between TBS + optimization of energy flow based on occupancy, weather and grid signals
services.preconditions_en: Always to be assessed

Single platform that allows manual control of multiple TBS

Single platform that allows automated control & coordination between TBS + optimization of energy flow based on occupancy, weather and grid signals
